description: Native American English. Male, early 30s. High quality, clear and broadcast-clean. Persona: steady night nurse. Emotion: calm, warm, attentive. Even, mid-low timbre kept soft for a ward at night, with flat Detroit vowels and a faint Spanish cadence beneath. Calm and measured rather than slow, he stacks facts plainly and dryly, his steadiness deliberate and practiced.
text: [whispers] Quiet now. Everyone's breathing easy. [warm] The Okonkwos left eggs at the counter... I put it down as a fee. Didn't know what else to call it. [serious] If she spikes, you come get me. Not the cabinet. I'll be up front.
